title: Add voice adapter API signatures to ARCHITECTURE.md
description: Voice adapters (sensevoice.js, whisper.js, piper.js, openai-tts.js, openai-whisper.js, elevenlabs.js, macos-say.js) are listed in directory structure but lack formal API sections with function signatures in ARCHITECTURE.md. Add brief API signature docs for each. Architecture gap: partial/minor.
